# kCMMetadataIdentifier_QuickTimeMetadataPresentationImmersiveMedia | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Media ](/documentation/coremedia)

- [ kCMMetadataIdentifier_QuickTimeMetadataPresentationImmersiveMedia ](/documentation/coremedia/kcmmetadataidentifier_quicktimemetadatapresentationimmersivemedia)

-  kCMMetadataIdentifier_QuickTimeMetadataPresentationImmersiveMedia 

Global Variable# kCMMetadataIdentifier_QuickTimeMetadataPresentationImmersiveMedia

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
let kCMMetadataIdentifier_QuickTimeMetadataPresentationImmersiveMedia: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coremedia/kcmmetadataidentifier_quicktimemetadatapresentationimmersivemedia#discussion)

Presentation data associated with Apple Immersive Video’s video frames. Data is a JSON-encoding of ImmersiveMediaSupport framework’s PresentationDescriptor object. Expected data type is kCMMetadataBaseDataType_RawData.
